name: SGN Spring Social
description: The Scottish Games Network's Spring Social is a relaxed evening event for anyone working in or interested in the Scottish games industry. Join us for drinks, conversation, and networking in central Glasgow. Whether you are a seasoned developer, a student, or just curious about the local games scene, everyone is welcome. No talks or formal agenda — just a chance to meet fellow game makers in a friendly, informal setting.
short_description: A relaxed networking evening for the Scottish games community in central Glasgow.
